selection.tie_break: support count descending, middle-point support descending, capped weighted distance ascending, stable OS link id ascending

terminal_binding.preferred: nearest shared topology node between selected target corridor and named terminal road
terminal_binding.fallback: nearest point on selected target corridor to the preserved source endpoint point
terminal_binding.non_road_labels: preserve exact exam wording and classify as named endpoint rather than silently aliasing it to a road

notes: The taxi JSON is the exam authority even when it differs from current real-world geography. Effective coordinates and geometry bindings are derived, versioned and reversible.
